Bi-Weekly Report
• VLCC spot market activity surges as geopolitical tensions spike - The recent surprising sad events in the Middle
East once again reminded us how important energy security is. Tanker owners have been through numerous cycles
of geopolitical uncertainty and know that during such uncertain periods charterers are willing to pay up to secure
tonnage and thus the option to lift oil. In addition, the fact that Chinese charterers returned to the market following
